assertions.assertion: Lists passkeys/WebAuthn/FIDO2 as a supported authentication method
assertions.rationale: Duende User Management's specific supported methods are product-specific knowledge.

assertions.assertion: Lists TOTP (authenticator apps) as a supported method
assertions.rationale: Without knowing the product, the specific TOTP support cannot be confirmed.

assertions.assertion: Mentions that multiple authentication methods can coexist for the same user
assertions.rationale: This multi-method coexistence is a Duende User Management feature detail.

assertions.assertion: Notes that OTP (email/SMS) is the default passwordless flow
assertions.rationale: OTP as the default flow is a Duende-specific design choice.
